ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOG, MSFT) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "52hi" TEXT /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "52lo" TEXT /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* Dividend amount for the stock on the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" TEXT /* Split coefficient for the stock on the given date */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock on the given date */,
  "price_change_percentage" TEXT /* Price change percentage from the previous day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price movement */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record the movement belongs to */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of price movement (e.g., up, down) */,
  "movement_value" TEXT /* Value of the price movement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price movement */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price movement data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_movements_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_value" TEXT /* Value of the market trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the volatility record belongs to */,
  "volatility_type" TEXT /* Type of volatility (e.g., high, low) */,
  "volatility_value" TEXT /* Value of the volatility */,
  "volatility_window" TEXT /* Window of time used to calculate volatility (e.g., 10 days, 30 days) */,
  "volatility_method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate volatility (e.g., standard deviation, variance) */,
  "volatility_source" TEXT /* Source of the volatility data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access record belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the access (e.g., IP address, device type) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "report_generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the report data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the visualization belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to generate the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "visualization_generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
